nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql: SELECT b.id, b.status, COUNT(ea_p.script_id) AS scripts_evaluated, COUNT(ea_c.script_id) AS scripts_coordinated FROM board b JOIN board_coordinator bc ON b.id = bc.board_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = bc.employee_id JOIN evaluator_pool ep ON ep.board_id = b.id AND ep.eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND ep.is_available = TRUE JOIN evaluation_attempt ea_p ON ea_p.board_id = b.id AND ea_p.evaluator_user_id = fc.employee_id AND ea_p.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' JOIN evaluation_attempt ea_c ON ea_c.board_id = b.id AND ea_c.evaluator_user_id = fc.employee_id AND ea_c.attempt_type = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY b.id, b.status
